1.name: Panacea
1.description: (1st/2nd) Heal wounds caused by others by licking them (as with a vampire's own healing saliva).
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 137

1.name: Sense Vitality
1.description: (VTDA/Revised/DAV/V20/V20DA) Detect how healthy an individual is or how they came to harm.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 457
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 260

2.name: Anesthetic Touch
2.description: Remove feelings of pain from a target or put a living creature to sleep.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 138
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 458

2.name: Auguring the Sickness
2.description: Discover the symptoms and severity of an illness in someone.

2.name: Gift of Sleep
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 260

3.name: Neutral Guard
3.description: (1st/2nd) Create a barrier about 10 feet from you that prevents others from approaching.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 138

3.name: Corpore Sano
3.description: (VTDA/Revised/DAV/V20/V20DA) Heal any sort of wound on yourself or others by expending vitae.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 459

3.name: Peacemaker
3.description: Soothe those around you and incline them to discuss disputes peacefully.

3.name: Healer's Touch
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 260

4.name: Mens Sana
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 459

4.name: Shepherd's Watch
4.description: (VTDA/DAV/V20) Create a barrier about 10 feet from you that prevents others from approaching (as Neutral Guard).
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 459
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 260

4.name: King David's Blessing
4.description: Use music to help heal someone mentally or physically.

4.name: Ending the Watch
4.description: Painlessly kill a mortal who wants to die.

4.name: Treat the Sick Mind
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 138

5.name: Unburdening the Bestial Soul
5.description: (1st/2nd/Revised/VTDA/DAV/V20/V20DA) Draw out someone's soul and cleanse it, improving the subject's Path rating.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 138
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 459
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 261

6.name: Pain for Pleasure
6.description: (1st) Make a subject feel intense pleasure instead of pain.

6.name: Renewed Vigor
6.description: (2nd/Revised/V20) Focus for a moment and heal all the wounds of a subject.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 138
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 460

6.name: Father's Judgement
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 261

7.name: Blissful Gaze
7.description: Gift of Sleep and Healer's Touch no longer require touch to work; wound penalties are reversed when Healer's Touch is used.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 261

7.name: Repulsion
7.description: (1st/2nd) Cause people to instinctively move away from you, as if remembering something unpleasant.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 139

7.name: Safe Passage
7.description: (VTDA/Revised/V20) Make nearby people inclined to let you pass and offer help if needed.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 460

8.name: Vitae Block
8.description: (1st/2nd) Make a portion of the target's blood pool unusable.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 139

8.name: Purification
8.description: (VTDA/Revised) Purge an individual of infernal possession and force such demons into nearby objects.

8.name: Rayzeel's Song
8.description: Make it easier to heal others.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 261

9.name: Heaven's Gate
9.description: (V20DA) Resurrect a recently killed mortal as a Revenant Spirit.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 262

9.name: Spirit Marionette
9.description: (1st/2nd) Take control of a target's soul and pantomime their actions.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 139

9.name: Unburden the Flesh-Clad Soul
9.description: (Revised/V20) Release a mortal's soul from their body to exist in the Astral Realms.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 460

10.name: Heaven's Gate
10.description: (1st/2nd/VTDA) Bring a recently dead mortal back to life.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 139
